SQLLite.SQL: SELECT po.po_number AS "PoNumber", po.po_total AS "PoTotal", po.payee_name AS "PayeeName", po.payee_addr_1 AS "PayeeAddr1", po.payee_addr_2 AS "PayeeAddr2", po.payee_addr_3 AS "PayeeAddr3", po.payee_addr_4 AS "PayeeAddr4", po.payee_addr_5 AS "PayeeAddr5", po.payee_postcode AS "PayeePostcode", po.payee_reference AS "PayeeReference", po.payee_dx AS "PayeeDx", poi.transaction_number AS "Tn", TO_NUMBER('') AS "Dds", poi.ppl_number AS "PplNo", po.print AS "Print" FROM PAYABLE_ORDERS po, PAYABLE_ORDER_ITEMS poi WHERE po.admin_court_code = ${param.adminCourtCode} AND ((po.print = 'Y' AND po.po_number = poi.po_number AND po.admin_court_code = poi.admin_court_code) OR (po.print = 'N' AND po.po_number = poi.po_number AND po.admin_court_code = poi.admin_court_code)) AND po.payee_name != 'CANCELLED' UNION SELECT po.po_number AS "PoNumber", po.po_total AS "PoTotal", po.payee_name AS "PayeeName", po.payee_addr_1 AS "PayeeAddr1", po.payee_addr_2 AS "PayeeAddr2", po.payee_addr_3 AS "PayeeAddr3", po.payee_addr_4 AS "PayeeAddr4", po.payee_addr_5 AS "PayeeAddr5", po.payee_postcode AS "PayeePostcode", po.payee_reference AS "PayeeReference", po.payee_dx AS "PayeeDx", TO_NUMBER('') AS "Tn", dd.dd_seq AS "Dds", dd.dd_ppl_number AS "PplNo", po.print AS "Print" FROM PAYABLE_ORDERS po, DEBT_DIVIDENDS dd WHERE po.admin_court_code = ${param.adminCourtCode} AND ((po.print = 'Y' AND po.po_number = dd.dd_po_number AND po.admin_court_code = dd.dd_po_admin_court_code) OR (po.print = 'N' AND po.po_number = dd.dd_ppl_number AND po.admin_court_code = dd.dd_po_admin_court_code)) AND po.payee_name != 'CANCELLED' AND dd.created = 'N' ORDER BY 13

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper edsAdmin
